title: Armor trim effect
description:
Give your armor trims a purpose! 
This plugin grants players potion effects when wearing a full matching set of trimmed armor.
body:
# Armor Trim Effect
---
**ArmorTrimEffects** is a plugin for Paper servers that gives players potion effects when wearing a full matching set of trimmed armor.

Wear all 4 pieces with the same armor trim pattern and you'll automatically receive the configured potion effect. Mix different trims and you get nothing — a complete matching set is required.

Fully configurable via `config.yml` — change any trim to give any potion effect at any level. Reload changes instantly with `/armortrimeffects reload`, no restart needed.

**Features**
- Supports multiple effects per trim
- Fully configurable via `config.yml`
- `/armortrimeffects reload` to apply config changes instantly

**Commands**

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---------|-------------|------------|
| `/armortrimeffects reload` | Reloads the config | `armortrimeffects.reload` |

**Permissions**

| Permission | Description | Default |
|------------|-------------|---------|
| `armortrimeffects.reload` | Access to reload command | OP |

**Installation**
1. Drop `armortrimeffects-1.0.jar` into your `plugins/` folder
2. Restart your server
3. Edit `plugins/ArmorTrimEffects/config.yml` to customize effects
4. Run `/armortrimeffects reload` to apply changes

![Support!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f83e5ea5328d40f4f650ecf2b21474e018790f0.png)

**Want to support plugin and authors?**

Just download this plugin (if you want to play with it :D)
